content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Nearly Lucky Number". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/110/A
constraints: The string consists only of the digits 4 and 7
content.outputFormat: YES if the number is nearly lucky, NO otherwise

solution.approach: Count the occurrences of 4 and 7 in the string and check if the count of 4 equals the count of 7 or if the string consists only of 4's and 7's

code.Python3:
str = input()
count4 = str.count('4')
count7 = str.count('7')
if count4 == count7 or (count4 == 0 and count7 == 0):
    print('YES')
else:
    print('NO')
